title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Toki, Morgans, Unknown person #7, Sabo as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That there have been casualties! News of Death sells like hotcakes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The results of the conference would be perfect too! And the fact that the killer hasn't been found sets the heart allutter!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go with a double A-side! Run front page articles on page 2, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: GOTCHA!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: President! A delivery from the government!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oho? A fat check!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An information suppression order, I SUP- pose. But what information?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kuwahahaha! Send this back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way I'll let this incident be buried!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No, no.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are to do what you're told, Morgans.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Uwagh! It's CIPHER POL!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Kyaah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How long have we been under watch?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Think twice before you step up to big news morgans!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: President! You just beat up a government official!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am a slave to my pocket- book,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But before that, I'm a jour- nalist!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And, at times, I'm a DJ of the written word! I make the public dance with lies! But I decide which lies I publish!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boys! Looks like this place ain't safe anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: Time to move shop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Gotcha!

dialogue.speaker: Morgans
dialogue.text: Morgans! King Wapol has just contacted us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems he has some leaked infor- nation!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: news of the decisions of the kings at reverie and the happenings that occurred there

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: spread like wildfire. The people were in shock.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kamabakka Kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: revolutionary army head- quarters

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a minute! What in the world is going on-buru?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way! Is this a joke?! Saboooo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the men, right?! blast that stuffed up chicken of a president!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is SABO we're talking about! This is impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I refuse to believe it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: First things first...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We've got to confirm the situation!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: SABO...

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: SABO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No... this can't be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We can't reach any of them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: How can we confirm what's going on?!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: GOA kingdom Royal ships

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He was in Mary Geoise?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My brother?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Goa kingdom Fuschia Village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's the matter with makino?

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Sabo... He's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: DAA DAA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I CAN'T BELIEVE SHE'S CLOSED TODAY.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure you've all heard the news already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I wanna drink, damn it!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 53 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
